Perdition megaship

Technology / Ship · First seen 3307-07-22 · 2 mentions
Active: 3307-07-22 → 3307-07-29
Technical Overview

Perdition megaship is a technology in the Elite Dangerous universe, mentioned from 3307-07-22 to 3307-07-29. Developed or used by Pleiades Concordat, Pilots Federation. The Pleiades Concordat requests deliveries to support the Far God cult in outfitting missionary megaships. The Testament will spread the faith while the Perdition and Sacrosanct will carry worshippers on a pilgrimage into deep space.

Mentions Timeline (2 articles)
3307-07-29
Far God Megaship Initiative Concludes
The Pleiades Concordat's initiative concludes successfully. The Testament will serve as a missionary vessel while the Perdition and Sacrosanct embark on a pilgrimage into deep space. New convert Leonard Yates (Eighty-Ninth Adherent of the Sixtieth Chapter) expresses gratitude for galactic community support.
3307-07-22
Initiative to Outfit Far God Megaships
The Pleiades Concordat requests deliveries to support the Far God cult in outfitting missionary megaships. The Testament will spread the faith while the Perdition and Sacrosanct will carry worshippers on a pilgrimage into deep space. Bounties are offered to protect deliveries from anti-xeno extremists.
